articles.title: ARE YOU SLEEPING ON COMPLIANCE?
articles.summary: When you’re fighting against all odds to get your product to market, compliance might not seem like the most important issue. But you can’t afford to ignore it, either. There’s a way to achieve continuous SOC 2, ISO 27001, or HIPAA compliance

articles.title: EMERGING ARCHITECTURES FOR LLM APPLICATIONS
articles.summary: The folks at a16z are always coming up with great content and this one is a great read on what we’re seeing as the trends around architectures for LLM applications. It’s posts like this that show the potential business opportunities around AI and how we are only just scratching the surface of what’s to come.

articles.title: WHY DUOLINGO HAS REPLACED TV ADS WITH TIKTOKS
articles.summary: An exploration into Duolingo’s new marketing strategy of making “unhinged” videos on TikTok, which has led to 6.7M followers on TikTok and 20.3M DAU.

articles.title: PROMISE NOT TO PROMISE
articles.summary: Jason Fried of 37signals talks about what it means to not have a roadmap and why promising things you end up not delivering can be really bad for the company, team, and customers.

articles.title: WHAT I WISH I KNEW AS A FIRST YEAR CFO
articles.summary: Hiring and managing a CFO can be tricky and getting it wrong is way more costly than a bad marketing, sales, or engineering hire. Some solid nuggets in here around being an early stage CFO.
Ever insightful, Jason drops some science around worrying trends in customer success. I too miss the days of when customer success was about … a customer’s success.

articles.title: THREE STARTUPS ON HOW TO STAND OUT IN A COMPETITIVE LANDSCAPE
articles.summary: A few handy tips on how to stay competitive during tough times that may seem obvious but nevertheless are handy to revisit.

articles.title: PLAYING WITH STREAMLIT AND LLMS
articles.summary: If you’re doing anything with generative AI and playing internally with your own LLMs, you should check out this post about Streamlit.

articles.title: RECENTLY, THAT’S DOUBLED.
articles.summary: When markets are struggling, increasing the option exercise window can be helpful for employees that move on. However, there can be tax risks involved so tread carefully here.

articles.title: GPT-4 GENERATED PITCHES ARE 3X MORE LIKELY TO SECURE FUNDING
articles.summary: Investor pitches generated by GPT-4 were 3x more likely to secure funding compared to human-written pitches.

articles.title: THE ROOT CAUSE OF MEDIOCRE DECISIONS
articles.summary: The quality of decisions, such as hiring, investing, or strategizing, largely depends on the quality of the options you have to choose from, rather than the choice itself.

articles.title: USING BLOCKCHAINS AND AI TO BUILD A BETTER INTERNET
articles.summary: The age old question of if you should switch to AI from crypto. The real magic will be regulatory clarity for blockchain + AI - that will be the big winner.
